description: ENingizimu Australia, abashayeli abafundi, abashayeli besikhashana kanye nabasebenza ngaphansi kokuhlolwa kumele bangabi ne-BAC uma beshayela.
Uma kunemvula, yehlisa ijubane bese ushiya isikhala esengeziwe ngoba ibanga lokuma liyakhula futhi ukubonakala kungancipha.
Kumelwe wehlise ijubane uye ku-25 km/h uma udlula imoto yesevisi yezimo eziphuthumayo engashintshi ekhombisa izibani ezibomvu noma eziluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka ezikhanyayo.
Ungashayeli uma ukugula, ukukhathala, utshwala, izidakamizwa noma imithi kungathinta ikhono lakho lokushayela ngokuphepha.
Skena kahle ngaphambili naseduze kwemoto yakho ukuze ukwazi ukubona izingozi kusenesikhathi futhi uphendule ngokuphephile.
Nikeza amaloli namabhasi indawo eyengeziwe, gwema izindawo ezingabonakali futhi unikeze isikhathi esengeziwe lapho nihlanganyela umgwaqo nezimoto ezinkulu.
Imithwalo nama-trailer kumele kuphephe, kuvikeleke futhi kuhambisane nemikhawulo esemthethweni yezimoto kanye nokudonsa.
Uphawu oluthi AKUKHO UKUJIKA kwe-U lusho ukuthi akufanele ujike kuleyo ndawo.

Ngaphandle kokuba izimpawu zikuvumela, akumelwe ume noma upake ngaphakathi kwamamitha angama-20 ukusuka ezibanini zomgwaqo noma ngaphakathi kwamamitha ayi-10 ukusuka endaweni lapho kuhlangana khona izimoto ngaphandle kwezibani zomgwaqo.
Uma ujika endaweni yokuhlangana kwemigwaqo, kufanele unikeze abantu abahamba ngezinyawo ithuba lokuwela umgwaqo owungena kuwo.
Uma kudingeka ngamaphoyisa, kufanele ulandele ukuhlolwa kotshwala; ukwenqaba ukuphefumula noma ukuthatha isampula yegazi kungaholela ezijezisweni ezinkulu.
ENingizimu Australia, kumele ushayele ngesivinini esingamakhilomitha angama-25 ngehora ezindaweni zesikole uma izingane zikhona.
Esibonini sokuma noma emgqeni wokuma, kufanele ume ngokuphelele bese uvumela indlela njengoba kudingeka ngaphambi kokuqhubeka.
Ezimweni ezimanzi, yandisa ibanga lakho elilandelayo ukuze uvumele ukubamba okuncishisiwe kanye nebanga lokuma elide.
Ungalandeli amaloli eduze, ngoba lokho kukuvimbela ukubona kwakho phambili futhi kunciphisa isikhala esidingekayo sokuma ngokuphepha.
Uma kukhona izimpawu zomsebenzi womgwaqo noma abasebenzi, yehlisa ijubane, landela umkhawulo wejubane obekwe bese ushayela ngokucophelela.
Izimoto ezivunyelwe kuphela ezingashayela emzileni webhasi ngaphandle kokuthi izimpawu noma imithetho yomgwaqo ivumela enye imoto ukuthi ingene isikhashana.
Izindawo zokulayisha zenzelwe izimoto ezivunyelwe uphawu kuphela, futhi ukusetshenziswa kabi kungaholela enhlawulo.
